message:
fix(clippy): resolve new warnings in bocpd, causal_dag, differential_snapshot

- bocpd.rs: ln(1+x) → ln_1p() for numerical accuracy
- causal_dag.rs: manual RangeInclusive::contains → (0.0..=1.0).contains()
- differential_snapshot.rs: clone on Copy type → direct copy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
